message:
feat(ftui-render): Implement BufferDiff with row-major scan

- Add BufferDiff struct for computing changed cells between buffers
- Implement row-major scan for cache efficiency (4 cells per cache line)
- Add ChangeRun type for coalescing adjacent changes
- Include 14 comprehensive tests covering:
  - Empty/identical buffer detection
  - Single and multiple cell changes
  - Adjacent cell coalescing into runs
  - Gap handling in runs
  - Multi-row change detection
  - Color-only changes
  - Full buffer changes

This enables the Presenter to emit minimal ANSI sequences by only
updating cells that actually changed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
